title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 21 2023

section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 21 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures fall today by 0.99%. the main contract I2309 closed 797.5. some traders were negative to sell, and quotation is still stronger;Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
